narrative:
category_one_description: The applicant seeks proposals for Dedicated Internet Access delivered via fiber for school locations in Silver Spring, Maryland. Vendors should provide pricing for service tiers ranging from 1 Gbps to 5 Gbps, including all installation, activation, and recurring monthly costs. Service should include appropriate Service Level Agreements covering uptime, latency, and support response times. Equivalent service solutions that meet the bandwidth and reliability requirements will be considered.
service_type: Data Transmission and/or Internet Access
service_category: Category 1
function: Internet Access and Data Transmission Service
minimum_capacity: 1024.00 Mbps
maximum_capacity: 5120.00 Mbps
installation_initial: True
form_nickname: YESHIVA OF GREATER WASHINGTON  DY 2026 C1
